text: REVEALED: Saudi Arabia conducted covert airstrikes on Houthi targets in Yemen over past 2 weeks — first Saudi strikes since 2023 ceasefire. WSJ reports MBS authorized strikes after Houthi missile targeted Jeddah desalination plant. Saudi officially denies involvement but satellite imagery confirms strike patterns consistent with Saudi F-15E aircraft.
verificationNote: Wall Street Journal exclusive report. Saudi denial on record. Satellite imagery analysis by Planet Labs consistent with claim.

text: ECONOMY: April CPI hits 3.8% — highest since Feb 2024. BLS data shows energy +11.2%, food +5.1%, transportation +8.7%. War-driven inflation now undeniable. Gas $4.50 national average per AAA. Hegseth faces Senate Armed Services Committee on $29B Pentagon war spending — requests $1.5T FY2027 defense budget.
verificationNote: Bureau of Labor Statistics official CPI release confirmed. AAA daily fuel gauge confirmed $4.50. C-SPAN broadcast Hegseth hearing.

text: DIPLOMACY: Trump departs for Beijing telling reporters 'we will finish the job' — 2-day summit with Xi May 14-15 to pressure China on Iran oil purchases and Hormuz mediation. USS Alaska (SSGN) transits Gibraltar heading to Mediterranean. India launches Bharat Maritime Initiative Partnership (BMIP) for Indian Ocean protection.
verificationNote: AP and Reuters confirmed Trump departure and 'finish the job' quote. USNI News confirmed USS Alaska transit. Indian MoD confirmed BMIP.

text: OIL SURGE: Brent crude hits $104.97 (+31.5% from pre-war), WTI breaks $101.63 (+34.6%). Hormuz Day 71 blockade continues — only 2.1M bpd transiting vs 15M pre-war. EU VP Kallas extends Operation Aspides to Hormuz. IEA emergency session called for Thursday on strategic reserve coordination.
verificationNote: CNBC and Bloomberg confirmed oil prices. EU Council press release confirmed Aspides extension. IEA confirmed emergency session.

text: LEBANON UPDATE: Hezbollah FPV fiber-optic drones continue targeting IDF positions — 24 attack waves in past 48h. 2 medics killed in Nabatieh airstrike on Islamic Health Society ambulance. Total Lebanese killed Day 74: 13 in Kfar Dounine strike alone. Israel Defense Ministry still seeking counter-drone solutions. 103 medical workers killed since war began.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera Day 74 liveblog confirmed casualties. Alma Center weekly report confirmed fiber-optic drone tactics. Lebanese Health Ministry figures.

text: SENATE: War powers resolution fails 50-49 — closest vote yet. Murkowski (R-AK), Collins (R-ME), Paul (R-KY) break with GOP. Senate has now rejected 7 attempts since March 2. Trump admin argues 60-day WPR clock expired under the ceasefire. Rubio calls WPR '100% unconstitutional.'
verificationNote: TIME, CBS News, The Hill, Newsweek, Fox News confirmed vote tally and defectors. Rubio quote confirmed by The Hill.

text: DIPLOMACY: Netanyahu's PM Office reveals secret March 26 visit to UAE — met MBZ in Al-Ain for several hours. Israeli Iron Dome batteries secretly deployed to UAE during war with IRGC. Haaretz and Times of Israel confirm 'historic breakthrough.' First Israeli PM visit to UAE since Abraham Accords. UAE-Mossad intelligence cooperation confirmed by JPost.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Washington Post, CBS News, Times of Israel, Haaretz all confirmed PM Office statement and March 26 date. Iron Dome deployment confirmed by US Ambassador Huckabee.

text: BRICS/DIPLOMACY: Iran FM Araghchi arrives New Delhi for BRICS FMs meeting — war overshadows entire agenda. Iran demands ceasefire + Hormuz reopening as prerequisites to nuclear talks. India struggling to produce joint statement given UAE-Iran tensions within bloc. 80%+ of Iranian crude exports go to China — Beijing's leverage in Trump-Xi summit is enormous.
verificationNote: PressTV, BusinessWorld, CNBC Africa confirmed Araghchi's Delhi arrival. PressTV confirmed BRICS speech. Al Jazeera analysis confirmed China's 80%+ Iranian oil share.

text: BEIJING SUMMIT: Trump lands in China for 2-day Xi summit — mixed signals on Iran. Said 'long talk' on Iran, then minutes later 'I wouldn't say Iran is one of them, we have it under control.' CFR analysis: China holds upper hand given Iranian oil leverage. Analysts say Taiwan and trade concessions likely required from US in exchange for Xi pressuring Tehran.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera and NPR confirmed Trump's contradictory departure remarks. CFR and Soufan Center analysis confirmed. CNBC confirmed world leaders watching summit from Singapore to Brussels.

text: IRAN READINESS: Brigadier-General Akrami Nia says Iran military at 'highest level of readiness,' vows 'there is no room for retreat.' Parliament threatens 90% uranium enrichment if attacked again. IRGC executed Israeli spy, sentenced to death by Supreme Court. Hardliners blocking Pezeshkian government from accepting any deal — Iran International reports internal power struggle over negotiations.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera liveblog confirmed Akrami Nia quote. Haaretz and Times of Israel confirmed enrichment threat. Iran International confirmed internal power struggle.

text: CONGRESSIONAL PRESSURE: Hegseth faces bipartisan grilling at House Armed Services Committee — WaPo reports 'intense frustration' from both parties over $29B war cost and lack of exit strategy. FDD overnight brief notes Soufan Center analysis: Trump-Xi summit faces high-profile issues including Iran, Taiwan, trade, AI oversight, and strategic minerals. Senate war powers vote 50-49 — unprecedented GOP defection.
verificationNote: Washington Post and PBS confirmed Hegseth grilling. Soufan Center intel brief confirmed. TIME and CBS News confirmed final vote count.
